name: Eight Jewel Chicken
recipeIngredient: 3 teaspoons Rice wine or dry sherry
2 Med Green peppers, cut into pieces
1 tablespoon Oyster sauce or light soy sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the chicken breasts and marinate them with soy sauce, rice wine or dry sherry, corn starch, and water for about half an hour.
2. Heat a wok or pan over high heat. Add peanuts and stir-fry for 30 seconds, then remove.
3. Add some oil, garlic, and ginger to the pan and stir-fry for a few seconds.
4. Add the marinated chicken breasts to the pan and stir-fry briefly until cooked through.
5. Add the onions, bok choy leaves, straw mushrooms, water chestnuts, and peanuts.
6. Pour in the sauce mixture (ketchup, oyster sauce or light soy sauce, wine, and hot pepper flakes dissolved in cornstarch solution) and let it simmer and thicken.
7. Serve immediately.
